allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\KANGGU~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pet-timer-screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $w = 500; $h = 60; $x = $screen.Width - $w; $y = $screen.Height - $h; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($x, $y, 0, 0, [System.Drawing.Size]::new\($w, $h\)\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\KANGGU~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tray-check.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; Write-Host "Screen: $\($screen.Width\) x $\($screen.Height\)"; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\(0, 0, 0, 0, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\KANGGU~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\fullscreen2.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Saved")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem release -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length / 1MB, 1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\src\\pet-timer-app"; Get-ChildItem release\\ -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "0\\.2\\.1|latest\\.yml" } | Select-Object Name, Length)
